name: Pink Busy Board
shortDescription: A hands-on busy board designed to help toddlers practice everyday skills through play.
longDescription: The Jagsy Joy Pink Busy Board helps toddlers explore buckles, buttons, zippers, laces, and other everyday activities in a playful way. It is designed for quiet play, travel time, and early skill-building at home or on the go.
benefits: Travel-friendly for car rides and trips
